server.not_running_default: Server is not running. Please start the server first
server.module_missing: ❌ Module '{{module}}' is not installed. This server cannot be controlled.

errors.alias_conflict: ❌ Alias '{{alias}}' is ambiguous — it matches multiple modules: {{modules}}. Please use a more specific alias.
errors.multiple_instances: ⚠️ Multiple '{{module}}' instances exist. Use an instance name instead of the module alias.
errors.permission_denied: ❌ You don't have permission to use this command.
errors.local_single_guild_only: ⚠️ Local bots can only be used in one server. Currently in {{count}} servers. Please remove the bot from unused servers.

cloud.register_complete: ✅ Registration complete! Token sent via DM.
cloud.music_local_only: 🎵 Music feature is only available in local mode.

music.not_available:
🎵 Music feature requires additional packages!
`cd discord_bot && npm install`
music.join_voice_first: 🎤 Please join a voice channel first!
music.no_permission: 🚫 I don't have permission to connect or speak in your voice channel!
music.bot_in_other_channel: 🎵 The bot is already playing in another voice channel (**{{channel}}**). Please use that channel!
music.skipped_no_next: ⏭️ No next track in queue. Continuing current song!
music.shuffle_need_more: 🔀 Need at least 2 tracks in queue to shuffle
music.error_unavailable: This video is private or has been removed
music.error_geo_blocked: This video is not available in your region
music.error_copyright: This video is blocked due to a copyright claim
music.error_network: Network error occurred. Please try again later
music.error_tool_missing: yt-dlp or ffmpeg not found. Please reinstall music dependencies
music.play_usage: 🎵 Usage: `{{prefix}} music play <YouTube URL or search query>`
music.not_available_relay: 🎵 Music is not available in cloud (relay) mode. Please switch to local mode!
music.age_restricted: 🔞 **{{title}}** — This video is age-restricted and cannot be played. cookies.txt setup is needed.
music.login_required: 🔒 **{{title}}** — This video requires login. cookies.txt setup is needed.
music.auto_disconnect: 👋 Everyone left! Stopping playback and disconnecting.
music.loop_disabled:
➡️ Loop off: **{{title}}**
Queue will resume from next track.
music.radio_enabled: 📻 Radio mode ON — Auto-playing recommendations based on **{{title}}**!
music.radio_need_track: 📻 Play a track first to start radio mode!
music.radio_filled: 📻 Added {{count}} recommended tracks to the queue!
music.normalize_enabled: 🔊 Audio normalization ON — Volume will be leveled across tracks!
music.normalize_disabled: 🔇 Audio normalization OFF — Playing at original volume levels.
music.help:
🎵 **{{prefix}} {{mod}}** — Music Player

• `{{prefix}} <YouTube URL>` — **Play instantly** ⚡
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} play <query>` — Play first result
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} search <query>` — Pick from 5 results 🔘
• `{{prefix}} stop` — Stop + leave

• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} pause` — Pause
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} resume` — Resume
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} skip` — Next track
• `{{prefix}} loop` — Loop current track 🔂
• `{{prefix}} loop off` — Disable loop → continue queue
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} radio` — 📻 Toggle auto-play recommendations
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} queue` — Queue
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} np` — Now playing
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} volume <0-200>` — Volume
• `{{prefix}} {{mod}} shuffle` — Shuffle queue

💡 While playing, shortcuts like `{{prefix}} skip`, `{{prefix}} pause` work directly!
💡 Aliases: music, dj

music_ui.idle_hint: Type a song title or YouTube link!
music_ui.queue_empty: Queue is empty — add some tracks!

rps.timeout: ⏰ Time's up! Try again next time~
